data.title: Ouster, Inc. Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. revealed the pricing of an underwritten public offering comprising 3,621,876 shares of its common stock (Nasdaq: OUST) at a rate of $55.22 per share, prior to underwriting discounts and commissions. The entire share quantity in the Offering is offered by the Company, amounting to gross proceeds for Ouster. Ouster is a pioneer in sensing and perception for Physical AI.

data.title: CleanAmps and Excelsior Energy Capital Expand Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Deployment of U.S.-Owned Digital Infrastructure Platform
data.description: A USA control technology, energy infrastructure, and AI infrastructure company named CleanAmps Holdings Inc. revealed an increased partnership with Excelsior Energy Capital. The aim is to speed up the commercialization and deployment of digital infrastructure solutions to meet the rising need for stable computing capacity and robust power infrastructure. This collaboration will focus on enhancing the development and implementation of these solutions, in response to the escalating demands.

data.title: Lifted’s Highlandia THC Beverage Becomes a Top-Five Seller in WI, and Plans Expansion Into Other States
data.description: Highlandia THC beverage from Lifted has quickly risen to become one of the top five best-selling products in Wisconsin. The beverage, containing THC, has gained popularity and sales have soared in the state. Lifted is now planning to expand its distribution into other states to capitalize on this success. This move comes as sales numbers for Highlandia THC beverage continue to impress, indicating a growing demand for the product. The company aims to replicate this success in new markets by increasing availability and accessibility for consumers.

data.title: Partner Therapeutics Announces Publication of Results From the eNRGy Trial of Zenocutuzumab in Patients with NRG1+ Cholangiocarcinoma in Journal of Clinical Oncology (JCO)
data.description: Zenocutuzumab has demonstrated significant and long-lasting effectiveness against tumors, with a notable decrease in toxicity and without any safety concerns that could limit treatment. These attributes set it apart from current standard treatment options. This promising news comes from Partner Therapeutics, Inc. (PTx) based in Lexington, Massachusetts, as of July 2, 2026. This breakthrough potentially represents a major advancement in cancer treatment, with the drug showing promising results that could vastly improve patient outcomes.

data.title: Peter Ballantyne Cree Nation Withdraws Judicial Review and Confirms Support for the Wheeler River Project
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Denison Mines Corp. announced that Peter Ballantyne Cree Nation (PBCN) has decided to withdraw its judicial review application concerning Denison. The review was initially filed in the Court of King's Bench for Saskatchewan. Denison, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: DML) and the NYSE American (DNN), did not disclose the specific reasons behind PBCN's withdrawal. This development marks a significant shift in the legal proceedings involving Denison and PBCN, impacting the ongoing situation between the two parties.

data.title: GFL Environmental Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Miami Beach, FL - In a recent announcement on July 2, 2026, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) declared a cash dividend of US$0.0169 per outstanding subordinate voting share and multiple voting share. The company's Board of Directors made the decision, providing shareholders with this dividend payout.

data.title: Comviva's mobiquity Pay® Reinforces Mobile Money Leadership with Consecutive Platinum Win at Juniper Research Future Digital Awards 2026
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Comviva, a renowned company specializing in customer experience and data monetization solutions, was awarded the prestigious Platinum Winner title in the 'Best Mobile Money Offering' category for its innovative mobiquity® Pay platform. This recognition was bestowed at the Juniper awards ceremony, solidifying Comviva's position as a global leader in the industry. The platform's success underscores Comviva's commitment to providing top-notch mobile money services, setting a benchmark for excellence in the field.

data.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply dropped 15% in Q2, ending a three-year uptrend, as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted. Treasury-backed products like BUIDL, USYC, and USDY saw growth.
data.description: During the second quarter, the supply of yield-bearing stablecoins decreased by 15% due to the decline of sUSDe and sUSDS. In contrast, Treasury-backed products such as BUIDL, USYC, and USDY experienced growth.

data.title: 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses, incl. 131 Tron addresses, added to OFAC sanctions list. Over $1.4M in donations frozen by Tether.
data.description: A total of 134 cryptocurrency wallet addresses associated with ISIS-K have been included in the sanctions list by OFAC. Among these, 131 Tron addresses have received over $1.4 million in digital currency donations. This information was disclosed by Chainalysis.

data.title: HBCU ELI celebrates successful June residency, strengthening leadership pipeline for HBCUs
data.description: In a recent announcement on July 2, 2026, the HBCU Executive Leadership Institute at Clark Atlanta University confirmed the completion of its sixth Community of Fellows program. This initiative aims to groom upcoming presidents and executive leaders. The program is designed to equip individuals with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in leadership roles. Clark Atlanta University continues to play a crucial role in developing future leaders through this program, with a focus on underrepresented minorities in executive positions.

data.title: Höegh Evi and Nord Gas Solutions Validate Ammonia-to-Hydrogen Cracking Technology for Floating Hydrogen Terminals
data.description: Located in Stord, Norway, on July 2, 2026, Höegh Evi and Nord Gas Solutions (previously known as Wartsila Gas Solutions) have effectively concluded performance testing for their innovative technology that converts ammonia into hydrogen at the Sustainable Energy pilot plant. This development marks a significant milestone in the field as it offers a promising solution to the growing demand for clean energy sources. The pilot cracker demonstrated impressive results, exhibiting an efficiency rate of over 90%, showcasing its potential to produce hydrogen on a large scale. The successful testing paves the way for further advancements in sustainable energy production, with the technology poised to make a substantial impact in the sector.

data.title: Vermiculus to Deliver 24/7 Clearing System for Prediction Markets to Leading Global Crypto Exchange
data.description: Stockholm, on July 2, 2026, Vermiculus, an independent technology provider for market infrastructure, has been chosen by a major crypto exchange to provide event-driven clearing services for prediction markets. This comes as part of their VeriClear®-based clearing solution, offering real-time capabilities. The exchange is one of the largest in the world, highlighting the significance of this partnership.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Buys 67 Bitcoin Bringing Bitcoin Treasury to Approximately 849 Bitcoin
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Las Vegas, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), a leading AI data center company focused on Bitcoin, disclosed its recent acquisition activity. Between June 30 and July 1, 2026, the Company procured a notable amount of assets.
